name: Core Set 2019

draft.notes: Land slot may hold a basic land, a tap-land (10 extra non-basic lands, this slot only), or a checklist card. One mythic DFC replaces the rare; when a DFC appears a checklist is also present. If a foil appears it displaces a common and appears after the rare.

statedRates: common foils appear ~1 in 8 packs; uncommon/rare/tap-land foil rates not known exactly
sourceNotes: Core set. Normal large-set size aside from one DFC and ten tap-lands. Four basic land variations. Printed USA and Belgium. 36 packs per box.
